meta.summary: NCBI AMRFinderPlus 4.2.7 runtime for detecting antimicrobial resistance genes, resistance-associated point mutations, and selected virulence/stress genes with user-managed AMRFinderPlus databases.
meta.description: NCBI AMRFinderPlus 4.2.7 runtime for detecting antimicrobial resistance genes, resistance-associated point mutations, and selected virulence/stress genes with user-managed AMRFinderPlus databases.

test: amrfinder --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '4.2.7' >/dev/null && amrfinder --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Identify AMR and virulence genes' >/dev/null && { amrfinder_update --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'amrfinder_update' >/dev/null && { amrfinder_index --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'amrfinder_index' >/dev/null

blastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastn:' >/dev/null && blastp -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastp:' >/dev/null && blastx -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastx:' >/dev/null && makeblastdb -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'makeblastdb:' >/dev/null && hmmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER' >/dev/null && hmmpress -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-amrfinderplus-stxtyper-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd /opt/amrfinderplus/stx; stxtyper --debug --nucleotide_output "$tmp/basic.nuc_out" -n test/basic.fa > "$tmp/basic.tsv"; diff -q test/basic.expected "$tmp/basic.tsv" >/dev/null; diff -q test/basic.nuc_out.expected "$tmp/basic.nuc_out" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-amrfinderplus-missing-db-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>tiny\nMKKFFDSRREQQLKELNQ\n' > "$tmp/tiny.faa"; if amrfinder -p "$tmp/tiny.faa" --database "$tmp/no-db" > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/run.log" >&2; exit 1; fi; grep -Ei 'database|directory|No such|not found' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: NCBI Antimicrobial Resistance Gene Finder Plus (AMRFinderPlus)
upstream.license: Public Domain / United States Government Work
